text.title: Go-to-Market Strategy Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys plus per-field constraints.

example.note: Required fields missing or values out of allowed range. Validator rejects.

antipattern.reason: Fires constantly or never; cadence becomes unenforceable.
Channel ownership rots; named human required.

antipattern.description: Empty evidence / inputs array with conclusions filled.
antipattern.reason: Unevidenced conclusions are demoted to hypotheses.
